title: Implement Part 2, Section 2 of Higgins Music Hub build

requirements.text: Implement Part 2, Section 2 of the Higgins Music Hub portal build, continuing from where Part 2 Section 1 left off. Review the current state of the codebase, audit findings in portalAudit.ts, and the rollout documentation to determine which features, pages, or components are next in the build sequence for Section 2, then implement them.
acceptanceCriteria: All features scoped to Part 2 Section 2 are implemented and functional
No regressions introduced to features shipped in Part 2 Section 1
Backend Motoko code compiles without errors
New functionality is accessible through the existing portal routing structure

constraints: Do not modify files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui
All Motoko logic must remain in the single main actor file (backend/main.mo)
Preserve all existing entity types and cross-linking relationships defined in the backend
nonGoals: Re-implementing or modifying features already shipped in Part 2 Section 1
Changes to the smoke test or rollout documentation files
